contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/awards.md
contract.description: Aggregates award transaction counts and obligations for a single toptier agency and fiscal year, with optional funding/awarding perspective and award-type filters.

toptier_code.description: CGAC or FREC toptier agency code identifying the aggregation target.
toptier_code.constraints: Required. Numeric string identifying the agency; observed requests succeed for 3-digit CGACs like '020' and 4-digit FRECs like '9553'. Unknown codes return 404.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year to aggregate; omitted requests use the API's current fiscal year (2026 as of last verification).
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional. Integer between 2008 and 2026 inclusive. Non-integer values return 400; values outside the range return 422.

agency_type.description: Selects whether aggregation is computed from the awarding or funding agency perspective.
agency_type.constraints: Optional. Case-sensitive enum ['awarding','funding']. Empty values behave like omission and default to 'awarding'; any other value returns 400.

award_type_codes.description: Comma-separated list (no spaces) of award type codes to include.
award_type_codes.constraints: Optional. Accepts '-1','no intersection','02','03','04','05','06','07','08','09','10','11','A','B','C','D','IDV_A','IDV_B','IDV_B_A','IDV_B_B','IDV_B_C','IDV_C','IDV_D','IDV_E'. Provide multiple codes as a single comma-delimited token without spaces; repeated parameters keep only the final value. Sentinels '-1' and 'no intersection' only zero the result set when supplied alone. Blank or invalid values return 400.

toptier_code.description: Echoes the requested toptier agency code.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year represented in the aggregation.

latest_action_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the latest action in scope, or null when no transactions matched.

transaction_count.description: Total number of transactions matching the applied filters.

obligations.description: Total obligated dollar amount for the filtered transactions.

messages.description: Warning or informational messages returned with the aggregation; fiscal years 2008-2016 include a DATA Act availability warning while 2017+ responses omit it.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Query arrays are implemented as comma-separated strings; repeating award_type_codes only retains the final value.
award_type_codes accepts undocumented sentinels '-1' and 'no intersection'; they only zero the result set when supplied alone.
Supplying an empty agency_type query value defaults to 'awarding'.
Fiscal years 2008-2016 return a DATA Act warning message even when numeric totals are present; 2017+ responses omit the warning.
latest_action_date becomes null whenever the filters return zero transactions.
risks: IPv6 connections returned empty replies during probing; clients may need to force IPv4 or retry on failure.
Strict formatting for comma-delimited award_type_codes means introducing spaces or lowercase values produces 400 errors.
latest_action_date can be null when filters isolate zero transactions, which may break parsers expecting a timestamp.

probes.notes: pass - default response uses current FY 2026 awarding totals
pass - fiscal_year filter changes aggregation and latest_action_date
pass - funding agency_type adjusts totals while default FY stays 2026

response.bodyExcerpt: {"fiscal_year": 2008, "latest_action_date": "2008-09-30T00:00:00", "toptier_code": "020", "transaction_count": 41240, "obligations": 4643101404.1, "messages": ["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass - lower fiscal_year bound 2008 is accepted and returns DATA Act warning
pass - fiscal_year 2017 clears the DATA Act warning
pass - multiple codes must be comma-separated without spaces
pass - repeating award_type_codes only honors the final value ('B')
pass - sentinel 'no intersection' returns zero totals with null latest_action_date
pass - mixing '-1' with real award codes still returns the real codes' data
pass - blank agency_type parameter is accepted and treated as awarding default
fail - spaces in comma-separated award_type_codes trigger 400
fail - fiscal_year 2027 exceeds the allowed maximum

mismatches: Doc says award_type_codes is an array, but the live API expects a comma-delimited string without spaces and ignores all but the last repeated parameter.
Documented AwardTypes list omits sentinels '-1' and 'no intersection' that the API validates and accepts.
Docs do not mention the enforced fiscal_year range (2008-2026); values outside that range return 422.
risks: IPv6 connections returned empty replies during probing; clients may need to force IPv4 or retry on failure.
Strict formatting for comma-delimited award_type_codes means introducing spaces or lowercase values produces 400 errors.
latest_action_date can be null when filters isolate zero transactions, which may break parsers expecting a timestamp.
